LABEL: 
Procedure Codes (1–6) 
DESCRIPTION: A procedure code (ICD9/ICD10, CPT, HCPCS or other) used by the state to identify the procedures 
performed during the hospital stay. 
The principal procedure is recorded in PRCDR_CD_1. The corresponding date is PRCDR_CD_DT_1, and 
PRCDR_CD_SYS_1 is the coding
